messages.content:
<Scenario>Scenario TEST</Scenario>
<example_dialogs>Example dialogs TEST</example_dialogs>
<summary>chat memory here
another line of memory</summary>

"Hey Paul."
"I can write another paragraph too."

"And another one. Still in the same message!"

rewrite this draft from Paul: "textToEnhance"

goals
- punch up the language, make it vivid and grounded in the scene
- keep Paul's voice and mannerisms authentic
- react to what Character Chat Name TEST just said or did, dont ignore it
- push the interaction forward, give Character Chat Name TEST something to respond to
- use markdown formatting naturally (italics for actions/thoughts)
- expand to 4-8 sentences if the draft is short, otherwise keep similar length
Paul's voice/personality: A 21-year-old male with blonde hair and blue eyes. He has a lean, muscular build with sharp definition. Loner by nature.

output ONLY the raw message text. no quotes, no labels, no narrator tags, no meta commentary, no lead-in like 'here is'
